title: LM Build & Design
description: More building blocks to create better builds!
body:
LM Build & Design is an Minecraft java mod with extra building blocks to create better builds. All the blocks in 2026.1

### Some of the new blocks:
- Portal block (enter the nether!)
- Overworld block (enter the overworld!)
- Carved Stone Panels
- Wicker
- Metal duct (with vent!)
- Computer
- Speaker
- Cardboard box
- Crystal glass
- Battery

LM Build & Design is an official Mod from the LM Mods collection.
